name: Battlewasp - Azusa the Ghost Bow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｂ・Ｆ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ビー・フォース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>弓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のアズサ
name_jp_tl: Bee Force - Azusa the Spirit Bow
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
When your opponent takes effect damage from another "Battlewasp" monster: You can inflict damage to your opponent equal to the original ATK of that monster. You can only use this effect of "Battlewasp - Azusa the Ghost Bow" once per turn. When a monster is destroyed by battle with your "Battlewasp" monster, while this card is in your GY: You can Special Summon this card in Defense Position, but banish it when it leaves the field.

jp_sets.set: Collection Pack: Duelist of Revolution Version

action: Activates if effect damage is inflicted
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
